name: SatNet LEO Group 21
location_str: LC-9A @ Taiyuan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: A batch of 5 Low Earth Orbit communication satellites for the Chinese state owned SatNet constellation operated by the China Satellite Network Group.  The constellation will eventually consists of 13000 satellites.
rocket_fact: The 'Max-Q' callout during launch refers to the moment of maximum dynamic pressure, where structural stress on the vehicle is highest.
